questions.question: Paul urges believers to present their bodies as what?
options: Living sacrifices, holy and acceptable to God
questions.answer: Living sacrifices, holy and acceptable to God

questions.question: What should believers do instead of taking revenge, according to Paul?
Paul says believers should conform to the pattern of this world.
Don't be conformed to this world, but be _____ by the renewing of your mind.
If your enemy is hungry, feed him. If he is thirsty, give him a _____.
